title: SilentGearJEI
body:
*   **Mod Name:** SilentGear JEI Support
*   **Source:** This mod is a standalone module extracted from the mod _Journey of Reverie_.

> This standalone version is intended for players who prefer to use only the JEI support for SilentGear without any extra features.

*   **Features:**  
    *   Adds JEI integration to display materials and traits for SilentGear.
    *   The layout can be customized via the configuration file.
